provenance.notes: Processed 4 quotes from 5 verse files. Source: HistoricalChristianFaith/Commentaries-Database. License: PUBLIC DOMAIN.

data.author: John Wesley
data.quote: I believe it to be a duty to observe, to pray for the Faithful Departed.
data.source_title: Chapters on the Early Registers of Halifax Parish Church. Whitley & Booth. p. 20

data.author: John Wesley
data.quote: I believe that He [Jesus] was made man, joining the human nature with the divine in one person; being conceived by the singular operation of the Holy Ghost, and born of the blessed Virgin Mary, who, as well after as before she brought Him forth, continued a pure and unspotted virgin.
data.source_title: Letter to a Roman Catholic, DUBLIN July 18, 1749
